text: 活久见，Claude 也重置了额度！
明天 Codex 和 OpenAI platform 会有什么重要更新呢？
而且比 Codex 良心的是，它剩余时间不是顺延 7 天，而是剩下的时间都是满的😃 https://t.co/wiQlVcTWvx

比如我这周还剩2天自然重置，如果是 Codex 的重置，相当于重新7天的计数
而 Claude 则是这2天是7天满额token，2天后又是7天的重置

I find debates over whether companies find AI useful to be odd at this point

I talk to leadership teams at lots of big firms, and it is pretty universal that they are getting obvious and real value. The challenges now are going from individual uses to firm-level & how to scale.

The gains are most obvious in coding and operational areas. Even conservative organizations are adopting coding agents fast.

That doesn't mean AI adoption doesn't come with huge challenges and cost concerns, but it is not the same thing as saying that AI value isn't there.
For those who wants stats, rather than anecdotes https://t.co/iQDM5i2gDV
